title: Maximizing the Utility of Transcriptomics Data in Inflammatory Skin Diseases.
author: Wu J Fang Z Liu T Hu W Wu Y Li S
content: S-EPMC8586455 PMC8586455 Maximizing the Utility of Transcriptomics Data in Inflammatory Skin Diseases. Inflammatory skin diseases are induced by disorders of the host defense system of the skin, which is composed of a barrier, innate and acquired immunity, as well as the cutaneous microbiome. These
